title: HubSpot vs Privy (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: HubSpot vs Privy: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between HubSpot and Privy comes down to your specific use case. HubSpot is built for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform, while Privy targets Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

comparison_table.tool_a: Businesses That Want Email And Crm In One Platform
comparison_table.tool_b: Shopify Stores Wanting Email, Sms, And Popups In One Tool

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on businesses that want email and CRM in one platform
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool

faq.a: It depends on your use case. HubSpot wins for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform, while Privy is stronger for Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, HubSpot or Privy?
faq.a: HubSpot starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Privy to HubSpot?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
